sections.content: artificial flavors, ascorbic acid, glycerin, maltitol, monobasic sodium phosphate monohydrate, phosphoric acid, propylene glycol, purified water, sodium benzoate, sodium metabisulfite, sorbitol, sucralose

sections.title: Indications
sections.content:
temporarily relieves these symptoms due to hay fever or other upper respiratory allergies:

runny nose

itchy, watery eyes

sneezing

itching of the nose or throat

sections.title: Ask A Doctor Before Use If You Have
sections.content: liver or kidney disease. Your doctor should determine if you need a different dose.

sections.title: When Using This Product
sections.content: do not take more than directed. Taking more than directed may cause drowsiness.

sections.title: Stop Use And Ask A Doctor If
sections.content: an allergic reaction to this product occurs. Seek medical help right away.

sections.title: If Pregnant Or Breast-Feeding,
sections.content: ask a health professional before use.

sections.title: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children.
sections.content: In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center (1-800-222-1222) right away.

sections.title: Dosage
sections.content:
use only with enclosed dosing cup

mL = milliliter

adults and children 6 years and over

10 mL daily; do not take more than 10 mL in 24 hours

children 2 to under 6 years of age

5 mL daily; do not take more than 5 mL in 24 hours

children under 2 years of age

ask a doctor

consumers with liver or kidney disease

ask a doctor

sections.title: Storage
sections.content:
each 5 mL contains: sodium 6 mg

do not use if carton is opened, or if cap safety seal is broken or missing.

store at 20° to 25°C (68° to 77°F)

sections.title: Active Ingredient
sections.content: Active ingredient (in each tablet) Loratadine 10 mg

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: Purpose Antihistamine

sections.title: Warnings
sections.content: Warnings Do not use if you have ever had an allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients. Ask a doctor before use if you have liver or kidney disease. Your doctor should determine if you need a different dose. When using this product do not take more than directed. Taking more than directed may cause drowsiness. Stop use and ask a doctor if an allergic reaction to this product occurs. Seek medical help right away. If pregnant or breast-feeding, ask a health professional before use.

sections.title: Do Not Use
sections.content: Do not use if you have ever had an allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients.

sections.title: Ask Doctor
sections.content: Ask a doctor before use if you have liver or kidney disease. Your doctor should determine if you need a different dose.

sections.title: When Using
sections.content: When using this product do not take more than directed. Taking more than directed may cause drowsiness.

sections.title: Stop Use
sections.content: Stop use and ask a doctor if an allergic reaction to this product occurs. Seek medical help right away.

sections.title: Pregnancy
sections.content: If pregnant or breast-feeding, ask a health professional before use.

sections.title: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children
sections.content: Keep out of reach of children. In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away (1-800-222-1222).

sections.title: Other Safety Information
sections.content: Other information • do not use if printed blister unit is broken or torn • store between 20° to 25°C (68° to 77°F) • use tablet immediately after opening individual blister

sections.title: Inactive Ingredient
sections.content: Inactive ingredients croscarmellose sodium, crospovidone, hypromellose, magnesium stearate, mannitol, microcrystalline cellulose, natural and artificial mint flavor, sucralose

sections.title: Questions
sections.content: Questions or comments? 1-800-719-9260
